description.value: Price +1 bonus; Aura strong abjuration; CL 10th; Weight â DESCRIPTION A dispelling weapon functions like a spell storing weapon, but it may only store dispel magic; however, the caster level check to dispel gains an additional bonus equal to the weapon’s enhancement bonus. This bonus also applies to a magus’s dispelling strike arcana or a barbarian’s spell sunder or sunder enchantment combat maneuver check. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells dispel magic; Special creator must be a caster of at least 10th level; Cost +1 bonus
